data.title: QCP Capital: A more positive bullish outlook may not emerge until the third quarter
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News QCP Capital published an article today saying that last Friday's non-farm payrolls (NFP) data brought some respite to the stock market and cryptocurrency market, further reinforcing the market's expectations for a rate cut in May. Bitcoin remained consolidated around $86,000 for most of Saturday, seemingly laying the foundation for a steady recovery this week. However, this momentum was interrupted by the Bybit hack during the low liquidity period on Sunday, when hackers cashed out at least $300 million from a record $1.5 billion cryptocurrency theft, causing BTC and ETH to test key support levels again. Since hackers have shown a willingness to cash out rather than risk further losses (the stolen assets have depreciated by 25%), holders may sell in advance to avoid supply pressure from further selling by hackers, which may exacerbate today's price decline. 
In the past 24 hours, the risk reversal demand for put options has increased further, reflecting the market's growing concerns about additional selling pressure. Although $80,000 remains a key support level for BTC in the near term, the upside also seems to be limited as the narrative of strategic Bitcoin reserves has been fully priced in by the market. Recent options flows suggest that a more positive bullish outlook may not emerge until the third quarter. Until the cryptocurrency market finds a new narrative, BTC's correlation with the stock market may strengthen further in the short term. Currently, both risk assets are trading near recent lows, and with tariff risks still present, market volatility may rise ahead of the release of key US macro data - the Consumer Price Index (CPI, Wednesday) and the Producer Price Index (PPI, Thursday).

data.title: Space Nation’s core token OIK will be listed on Bybit Launchpool soon
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Space Nation's core token OIK will be launched soon, becoming Bybit's first Launchpool project in the near future.
It is reported that Space Nation is a leading Web3 game and entertainment company dedicated to creating an immersive science fiction universe across multiple game types, platforms and mainstream channels. Its core product Space Nation Online is a Web3 space opera MMORPG jointly created by game and Hollywood veterans. The project has a 5-year research and development history, with a total investment of more than 40 million US dollars, and is committed to bringing players a brand new science fiction virtual world.
During this Launchpool event, users can win 9,000,000 OIK rewards by participating in the event. Staking time: March 12, 10:00 UTC - March 19, 10:00 UTC.

data.title: A whale deposited 1.94 million USDC into HyperLiquid and set a 50x leverage to open a long position in ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 1.94 million USDC into HyperLiquid and set up a long order for ETH with 50x leverage. The whale still has an unfulfilled limit order to further go long on ETH at $2,062.
